inputs.titre: L'équipe de France triomphe à la Coupe du monde de football en Russie

reason: The image depicts the French team celebrating their victory at the World Cup. However, there are numerous anachronisms that make it unsuitable for a historically accurate representation. The most glaring is the presence of smartphones held by many spectators. Modern sportswear brands are also visible on the players' kits. Therefore, the image is rejected.
